    getAllContracts() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.data.ContractDao
    Retrieves all contracts from the database.
    getAllFaculties() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.data.FacultyDao
    Retrieves all faculties from the database, ordered by name.
    getAllRooms() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.data.RoomDao
    Retrieves all rooms from the database, ordered by room number.
    getAllStudents() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.data.StudentDao
    Retrieves all students from the database.
    getBundle(String, Locale) - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.PropertiesBundleProvider
    Gets a resource bundle for the given base name and locale.
    getCapacity() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Room
    Returns the capacity of the room.
    getDbConnection() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.database.DatabaseHandler
    Gets the active database connection.
    getEndDate() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Contract
    Returns the end date of the contract.
    getFaculty() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Student
    Returns the Faculty object associated with the student.
    getFacultyId() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Student
    A convenience method to get the faculty ID.
    getFullName() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Student
    Returns the student's full name.
    getGender() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Student
    Returns the student's gender.
    getId() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Contract
    Returns the contract's unique ID.

    Returns the faculty's unique ID.
    getId() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Room
    Returns the room's unique ID.
    getId() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Student
    Returns the student's unique ID.
    getName() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Faculty
    Returns the name of the faculty.
    getPhone() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Student
    Returns the student's phone number.
    getPrice() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Room
    Returns the price of the room.

    Returns the Room object associated with this contract.
    getRoomId() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Contract
    A convenience method to get the room ID.
    getRoomNumber() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Room
